title: caving samurai
description: Adds katanas from epic samurai for alex's caves (WIP)
body:
**»[Also check out my Youtube channel](https://youtube.com/@shroogmaming?si=MvmMabM7vkiSQnN5)«**

Epic samurai addon for alex's caves that adds more katanas

**EXEMPLE**:

**Uranium katana**

effects: slowness and resistance

![katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec508955779a2887f2d12067cf85fd1f0fe2853.jpeg)

**Abissal katana**

effects: health boost and regeneration

![katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c0c3abd3d619fb81ef7da6cb92d56147bab3e56.jpeg)
